_description: Pillar registry + cross-cutting meta-rules + dissolved-schema registry. Hook-loaded.

pillars.absorbs: types{} registry + tier_compliance + archetype_enum + archetype_conditional_fields + packet_only_fields + excluded_fields + retired_types + path_routing (SP13 T-4 absorbed from dissolved schemas/vault-schema.json 2026-05-14)
r37_coupled_surfaces: governance/foundation-master.json (forward — composed from this pillar via tools/build-foundation-master.sh)

pillars.absorbs: canonical tag-prefix taxonomy (SP13 T-4 absorbed from dissolved schemas/vault-schema._tag_prefixes + _tag_prefixes_meta 2026-05-14)

pillars.rule_id_range_note: R-07/R-09/R-12/R-14 are the originally-assigned range (T-32 fills body; pending T-13 closure). R-44 was allocated SP03 Session 20 for the _index.md universal mandate (Session 16 lock #2) — fresh ID outside the originally-assigned range; Phase D-E session reconciles all R-XX allocations into a single registry.
pillars.file_type_contracts_pattern: governance/file-type-contracts/<file>.json carries the per-file-type body-structure contract (k8s ValidatingAdmissionPolicy paramKind pattern); the pillar's `mandates.<file_type>` block declares the matcher + exemption list. SP03 Session 20 ships the _index.md contract as the first instance.

pillars._first_class_provenance: SP13 Session 1 follow-on (2026-05-14): LIFTED to first-class authoring pillar per feedback_doc_deps_first_class. Was originally framed as a retirement-fold target; reframed as the canonical authoring home for both hub-spoke cascades AND upstream→downstream write-time propagation edges. hooks/config/doc-dependencies.json retires under SP13 T-6 (canonical successor: this pillar). The validator schemas/doc-dependencies-schema.json is preserved.

cross_cutting_meta_rules.name: Atomic lockstep
cross_cutting_meta_rules.rule_text: Commits update JSON + narrative + ENFORCEMENT-MAP + CLAUDE.md atomically.

cross_cutting_meta_rules.name: Promotion framework
cross_cutting_meta_rules.rule_text: Tier 1 advisory + promotion_criterion. Clean data → Tier 2; none → retire.

cross_cutting_meta_rules.name: Self-healing boundary
cross_cutting_meta_rules.rule_text: Mechanical drift auto-fixes; semantic drift self-flags.

cross_cutting_meta_rules.name: Layer-3 Overlay Collision Tiebreaker
cross_cutting_meta_rules.rule_text: When adopter Layer-3 overlay and foundation canonical both declare the same rule ID, archetype enum value, or extensible entry kind: adopter Layer-3 SHADOWS foundation (adopter wins). Foundation declaration is preserved but does not fire. Adopter MUST carry `_override_reason` (free-text, mandatory) on every shadowing entry. Write-time enforcement via pre-write-guard.sh: shadowing writes without `_override_reason` are DENIED at write-time. Per-write `--force-override` flag bypasses the DENY for a single write; no persistent disable. Adopter renames are special-case shadows under a new name (no separate `_rename_history` field; adopter manifest is canonical naming). Foundation upgrades touching shadowed entries surface as merge conflicts in the adopter's vault repo plus `foundation-upgrade-touches-shadowed-entry` warning from librarian governance-parity-audit (audit-time, because foundation upgrades are not adopter writes). ADR-0006 documents the design rationale + 6 rejected alternatives.
cross_cutting_meta_rules.failure_mode: Silent collisions between adopter customization and foundation canonical produce unpredictable runtime behavior — rules with the same ID compete, archetype lookups fail, overlay edits silently disable foundation rules. Without the tiebreaker, every foundation upgrade is a potentially-breaking change for adopters with overlays on those entries; without write-time DENY, adopters discover collisions days later in audit reports rather than at the write itself.
enforcement_layer: pre-write-guard.sh write-time DENY on shadowing writes missing `_override_reason`
version-control merge-conflict surfacing on foundation upgrades touching shadowed entries

dissolved_schemas._description: SP13 T-4 + T-3 (2026-05-14): registry of schemas that have been semantically dissolved into pillars or the foundation-master bundle. Files remain physically present in foundation-repo until the last consumer migrates (T-3 hooks closed both; T-6 gate-config physical deletion; T-8 install.sh ship list, T-9 tests, T-10 docs for vault-schema). 'Dissolved' = no new authoring; canonical authority has moved to the named successors. Each entry carries `frozen_at`, `dissolution_sp_task`, `successors`, `consumer_migration_status`, `final_deletion_gating_task`.

consumer_migration_status.governance_authoring: MIGRATED in SP13 T-4 (2026-05-14 commit c4c79ea)
consumer_migration_status.hooks_pre_write_guard: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (2026-05-14 this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively
consumer_migration_status.hooks_post_write_verify: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (2026-05-14 this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively
consumer_migration_status.hooks_config_gate_config: DISSOLVED in SP13 T-3 (2026-05-14 this commit) — gate-config frozen with marker; physical deletion at T-6
consumer_migration_status.install_sh: PENDING — install.sh schema-copy list updates under SP13 T-8 (Session 5-6)
consumer_migration_status.onboarding_bootstrap_schemas_sh: PENDING — bootstrap-schemas.sh updates under SP13 T-8
consumer_migration_status.docs: PENDING — SP13 T-10 updates research/* + target-state/* + docs/*

schemas/vault-schema.json.final_deletion_gating_task: SP13 T-9 or T-10 (whichever closes last; the physical file deletion happens atomically with the last consumer migration per OQ-13-4 'migrate-then-drop in same commit')
schemas/vault-schema.json.frozen_artifact_policy: File at schemas/vault-schema.json remains intact (content preserved) and carries `_dissolved: true` top-level marker + `_canonical_successors` pointer block. No new authoring against this file — all updates go to the named successors. install.sh continues to ship the file until SP13 T-8 updates the ship list.

successors.r32.accepted_types: governance/foundation-master.json#types | keys (canonical 21) + foundation-master.json#r32_type_aliases | keys (5 aliases) — derived at runtime
successors.r32.type_aliases: governance/foundation-master.json#r32_type_aliases (interim — T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting; type-registry inversion +1 option locates these under frontmatter-rules.json#types.<canonical>.aliases[])
successors.r32.exempt_paths: governance/foundation-master.json#r32_exempt_paths (interim — T-6 pillar-shard decides final resting; frontmatter-rules.json is leading candidate)
successors.r32.schema_path: obsoleted by bundle-at-load (hooks no longer need schema-path indirection)

consumer_migration_status.hooks_pre_write_guard: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (2026-05-14 this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively
consumer_migration_status.hooks_post_write_verify: MIGRATED in SP13 T-3 (2026-05-14 this commit) — reads foundation-master.json bundle exclusively
consumer_migration_status.tools_build_foundation_master_sh: READS THIS FILE — interim contributor for r32/r47 slot composition; dependency drops at T-6 when file is physically deleted
consumer_migration_status.install_sh: PENDING — install.sh schema-copy list updates under SP13 T-6 + T-8 (Session 5-6) when physical deletion happens
consumer_migration_status.tests: PENDING — SP13 T-9 (Session 5-6) updates fixtures; any fixture asserting gate-config presence flips to foundation-master.json equivalents

schemas/gate-config.json.final_deletion_gating_task: SP13 T-6 (Session 4) — gate-config physical retirement; deletion of schemas/gate-config.json + schemas/gate-config-schema.json + tools/build-foundation-master.sh GATE_CONFIG dependency. Atomic with same-commit consumer-migration verification per OQ-13-4.
schemas/gate-config.json.frozen_artifact_policy: File at schemas/gate-config.json remains intact (content preserved) and carries `_dissolved: true` top-level marker + `_dissolved_marker` pointer block. No new authoring against this file — all updates go to the named successors. tools/build-foundation-master.sh continues to read it as interim contributor until T-6.

_sp13_t4_provenance: SP13 T-4 closing commit 2026-05-14: vault-schema dissolved into pillars; R-37 coupled_surfaces declarations added for frontmatter + tagging + mandatory-files + doc-dependencies pillars; gate-config interim references documented; foundation-master.json forward-references added (built under T-2 in same session). Closes OQ-13-1 + OQ-13-2 (revised) + OQ-13-3 governance side.
_sp13_t3_provenance: SP13 T-3 closing commit 2026-05-14: gate-config.json dissolved with marker (mirror T-4 vault-schema pattern); foundation-master.json bundle extended with r32_type_aliases + r32_exempt_paths + r47_tag_cap top-level slots (schema_version 1.0.0 → 1.1.0; bundle_version regenerated); hooks/pre-write-guard.sh + hooks/post-write-verify.sh migrated to foundation-master.json bundle-only reads (one file read per invocation via $(cat ...) shell-var pattern + jq-on-stdin slicing). Closes R-37 reconciliation entry 5 (hook direct-reads of source pillar JSONs).
